security.mfaDisableCodeHint: Enter the code from your authenticator app to disable

landing.heroDescription: Connect your Primavera database and ask questions in natural language. AI generates SQL queries, runs them securely and returns charts and tables in seconds.
landing.heroTrialText: 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps to start analyzing your data.
landing.step1Text: Install the Apura Connector on the Windows server where SQL Server runs. A single executable, no dependencies.
landing.step2Text: The Connector establishes an encrypted tunnel to the cloud. No open ports, no firewall configuration.
landing.step3Text: Type your question in the browser. AI generates the SQL, runs it on your database and returns the result with charts.
landing.featuresSubtitle: AI knows all Primavera tables. Sales, purchases, accounting, HR, inventory.
landing.featureReadOnlyDesc: The database is never modified. Only SELECT, validated by 3 security layers.
landing.featureLocalDataDesc: SQL credentials never leave the server. Results transit encrypted and are not stored.
landing.featureFastResponsesDesc: AI generates optimized SQL with NOLOCK and TOP. No waiting for manual reports.
landing.featureAutoChartsDesc: The system detects the best chart for each result. Bar, line, table.
landing.featureScheduledReportsDesc: Schedule recurring reports. Receive by email in PDF or CSV every week.
landing.featureTeamPermissionsDesc: Invite analysts with limited access. Control who can run queries and view reports.
landing.ctaSubtitle: 14-day free trial. No credit card. Setup in 5 minutes.

pricing.title: Simple and transparent plans
pricing.subtitle: Start with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
pricing.faqQueryAnswer: Each natural language question that generates and runs a SQL query counts as a query. Viewing saved results or exporting does not count.
pricing.faqChangePlanTitle: Can I change plans at any time?
pricing.faqChangePlanAnswer: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes are applied immediately and the amount is adjusted pro-rata.
pricing.faqSecurityAnswer: SQL credentials never leave your server. Results transit encrypted and are not stored in the cloud. Only SELECT is allowed.
pricing.faqInstallTitle: Do I need to install anything?
pricing.faqInstallAnswer: Yes, the Apura Connector — a lightweight executable that runs as a Windows service on the server where SQL Server is installed. No external dependencies.
pricing.faqVersionTitle: Does it work with all Primavera versions?
pricing.faqVersionAnswer: We support Primavera V9, V10 and Evolution. The database structure is standard across versions.
pricing.faqOverageTitle: What if I exceed the query limit?
pricing.faqOverageAnswer: Additional queries are charged at your plan's overage price. No surprises — you can see usage in real time on the dashboard.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.step1Text: Sign up at apura.xyz/signup. You will receive an API key for the connector.
docs.step2Text: Download the Apura Connector and install it on the Windows server where SQL Server runs. The connector is a standalone executable with no external dependencies.
docs.step3Text: Enter the API key and SQL Server credentials in the setup wizard. We recommend creating a dedicated SQL user with read-only permission (db_datareader).
docs.step4Text: The connector connects automatically to the cloud. Go back to apura.xyz and start asking questions about your data in natural language.
docs.reqNetworkValue: Outbound HTTPS access (port 443). No inbound ports required.
docs.securityP1: The connector establishes an outbound encrypted WebSocket connection (WSS/TLS). No need to open firewall ports.
docs.securityP2: SQL credentials remain exclusively on the local server. The cloud never sees the SQL Server password.
docs.securityP3: All queries are validated by 3 independent layers before execution: cloud validation, connector validation, and SQL Server permissions (SELECT only).

metadata.title: apura
metadata.description: Ask natural language questions about your Primavera data
